titleStmt.title: SII 38.395: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 395. (A.R. No. 395 of 1912.) DĒVIKĀPURAM, ARNI TALUK, NORTH ARCOT DISTRICT. On the second gōpura, right of entrance, Bṛihadāmba temple.

p.hi: King: Immaḍi Narasiṁha-mahārāya. Year: Śaka 1426, Raktākshi, Kaṉṉi, ba. 1, Wednesday, Aśvati = 25th September 1504 A.D.

summary.p: It records that Tirumalai Nāyakkar, an agent (kāriyattukku-kaḍavār) of Narasanāyakkauḍaiyār, granted 1200 kuḻi of wet land at Sembiyamaṅgalam, a tirunāmakkāṇi village of the temple at Dēvikāpuram, one kuṟuṇi of rice daily, and two paṇam per month and also two houses at Dēvakkāpuram to a priest Paḻakiṉaipperumāḷ, son of Tirukuraku-uḍaiyār, a priest of the Mahāgaṇapati temple at Paḍaivēḍu, for performing worship of the god, Tirumalar-uḍaiyanayiṉār and goddesses Periyanāchchiyār at Dēvakkāpuram in Murgamaṅgalappaṟṟu in Mēlkuṉṟa-nāḍu in Palkuṉṟa-kōṭṭam (a sub-division) of Jayaṅgoṇḍachōḷa-maṇḍalam. It is also recorded that the above donee was entitled to enjoy these properties perpetually and the taxes on land, āḷamañji, nīrkūli and others were remitted infavour of the priest. Further the record also mentions that Ekkappanāyakkar, father of (the donor), on earlier days, granted land and conducted worship.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu svastiśrī manmahāmaṇḍaleśvarametinimisara kaṇḍa kaṭṭāri sāḷuva (sāḷuva) [sā]ḷuva (sāḷuva) Immaṭi narasiṁha timmaiyadevamahārāyar prathivirājyam
paṇṇivaruḷā niṉṟa cakābdam 1000 4 100 2 10 6ṉ mel cellāṉiṉṟa rattākṣi camva(va)tsarattu kanniṉāyaṟṟu Aparapakṣattu prathamaiyum putavāramum peṟṟa Aśvatiṉāḷ śrīmatu ṉarasa(ā)nāyakka Uṭaiyar
kāriyattukkuk kaṭavār tirumalaināyakkar jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻamaṇṭalattu palkuṉṟakoṭṭattu melkuṉṟanāṭṭu murukamaṅkalappaṟṟu devakkāpuram tirumalar Uṭaiyār periya nācciyār pūcaiyum
caivvācāriyam paṭaiviṭu mahāgaṇapatināyiṉārkoyil Āḻvār tirukkurakuuṭaiyār putraṉ paḻakiṉaipperumāḷukku muṉnāḷ Appaṉ Ekkappaṉāyakkar pūcaikṣetram kuṭuttu naṭantu
varukaiyāl Iṉṉāyaṉār tirunāmakkāṇiyāṉa cempiyamaṅkalattil Erikiḻ nañcai nilattile Āyirattu Irunūṟu kuḻiyum nittiyam kuṟuṇi Ariciyum mātam Iraṇṭu
paṇamum tevakkapurattile Iraṇṭu maṉaiyum peṟṟu tirumalariuṭaiya nayiṉāraiyum periyanācciyāraiyum pūcaipaṇṇi candrādittyavaraiyum Anupa
vikka kaṭavarākavum Iṉtanilattai nokki Āḷamañci niṟkuRead nirkūlili Uṇṭānatellām mānnyamāka viṭṭom Intadharmmattukku Ahitam paṇṇinavarkaḷ keṅkai karai
yil kārāmpacuvai koṉṟa pāpattile pokakaṭavar Ākavum śubhamastu .
Digital edition of SII 38.395 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
